error_signature: Extract node produces no output when subworkflow is executed
title: Extract node fails to process binary data in subworkflow
symptom: The Extract node does not produce any output when called from a parent workflow via the Execute Sub-Workflow node, failing silently without an error message.
applies_when: Using Extract node in a subworkflow
Binary data passed from a parent workflow
not_this_if: Extract node works when subworkflow is tested independently
root_cause: Binary data does not automatically propagate through nodes in n8n. Each node must explicitly preserve binary data, which is often overlooked, leading to silent failures in extraction when using subworkflows.
fix_steps: In the 'Split Out' node, enable 'Include Binary' under Options.
In all 'Edit Fields (Set)' nodes, enable 'Include Other Input Fields'.
If necessary, add a Code node to directly reference the binary data.
agent_instruction: Enable 'Include Binary' in the Split Out node and 'Include Other Input Fields' in all Set nodes.
